faq.q: What does Perez Marzo Systems Development do?
faq.a: We develop software solutions and license them to our clients, with ongoing support and updates.
You access the system through a license. Billing and payments are handled through our accounting system; this site is informational.
Yes. You get a real support team that answers and stays with you. Reach out from the contact section.

faq.q: Can I try a solution before signing up?
faq.a: Contact our commercial channel and we'll arrange a demo based on your case.
